display_name: Monochrome Terminal — P3 amber (IBM 5151 / HP class)

source.notes: Amber monochrome CRT (P3 phosphor); typical of IBM 5151, HP, and Wyse terminals 1982-1990. dot_pitch_mm is N/A for monochrome.

P3 = Zn8:BeSi5O19:Mn (Zn-Be silicate Mn-activated). Yellow-amber emission at 602 nm peak, EIA medium-persistence ~13 ms. Wikipedia phosphor table gives xy (0.523, 0.469); corrected from previous averaged (0.560, 0.430). Used in IBM 5151 amber, DEC VR201 amber, Wyse 50 amber. EIA TEP-116 paywalled — exact batch chromaticity ±0.02 tolerance.
